mapper.select: SELECT p.*, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate), 0) FROM assignments a WHERE a.project_id = p.id AND a.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PLANNED')) as total_billing_rate FROM projects p ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
SELECT p.*, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate), 0) FROM assignments a WHERE a.project_id = p.id AND a.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PLANNED')) as total_billing_rate FROM projects p WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projects (customer_id, project_code, name, description, start_date, end_date, status, billing_type, unit_price, required_headcount) VALUES (#{customerId}, #{projectCode}, #{name}, #{description}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{status}, #{billingType}, #{unitPrice}, #{requiredHeadcount})
mapper.update: UPDATE projects SET customer_id = #{customerId}, project_code = #{projectCode}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, status = #{status}, billing_type = #{billingType}, unit_price = #{unitPrice}, required_headcount = #{requiredHeadcount} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(project_code) FROM projects WHERE project_code LIKE 'PRJ%'

SELECT p.id as project_id, p.name as project_name, c.name as customer_name, p.status as project_status, COALESCE(p.required_headcount, 1) as required_headcount, COUNT(DISTINCT a.engineer_id) as assigned_count, COALESCE(p.required_headcount, 1) - COUNT(DISTINCT a.engineer_id) as shortage, p.start_date as project_start_date, p.end_date as project_end_date FROM projects p LEFT JOIN customers c ON p.customer_id = c.id LEFT JOIN assignments a ON p.id = a.project_id AND a.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PLANNED') AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= CURDATE()) WHERE p.status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY p.id, p.name, c.name, p.status, p.required_headcount, p.start_date, p.end_date HAVING shortage > 0 OR (COALESCE(p.required_headcount, 1) > 0 AND assigned_count = 0) ORDER BY shortage DESC, p.start_date
